title: Mace Bros. Attack
description: This mod aims to bring the satisfying exclamations from the Mario and Luigi RPG games when you strike an enemy with a combo attack to the mace and it's Wind Burst enchantment!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/c0qwTXS_sEc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
This mod aims to bring the satisfying exclamations from the Mario and Luigi RPG games when you strike an enemy with a combo attack to the mace and it's Wind Burst enchantment!

Each bounce on an enemies head spawns a particle that echoes how well you are jumping, with the order being "OK", "GOOD!!", "GREAT!!", "EXCELLENT!!!"

 
Fabric/Client Side version by Meek:
https://modrinth.com/mod/mace-bros.-attack-fabric
 

Unfortunately due to my lack of coding know-how, this mod is server and client side when it could easily be client side. If anyone wants to take a stab at making it client-side only, be my guest! I would love to see a better rendition of this, and am willing to link your mod if you contact me with it!
